title: Michelle Blaine
compiled_truth: Michelle Blaine is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1980-01-01 to 2002-03-29), Michelle Blaine sent 33 and received 177 emails, totalling 210 interactions. Top correspondents: [John Novak](people/john-novak) (18), [B  Sanders](people/b-sanders) (15), [Bruce Lundstrom](people/bruce-lundstrom) (12), [Robert Williams](people/robert-williams) (9), [Peter Weidler](people/peter-weidler) (6).
